title: lycopodium clavatum var. eriostachys
intro: Lycopodium clavatum var. eriostachys, also known as club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lycopodium clavatum var. eriostachys include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
